rationale: Article VIII §1-d-1 governs open-space agricultural/timber land taxation. It is unrelated to residence homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b); no conflict exists.
quote: To promote the preservation of open-space land, the legislature shall provide by general law for taxation of open-space land devoted to farm, ranch, or wildlife management purposes on the basis of its productive capacity
_note: The cited constitutional provision concerns open-space land, not homestead exemptions. The relevant constitutional authority for homestead exemptions is Tex. Const. art. VIII, §1-b(c).
